notes: No SAFER match found for 'LEAKE ACADEMY BUS' or 'LEAKE' (any). The naming convention 'Leake Academy Bus #8 Inc' strongly suggests this is one of multiple parallel single-vehicle Inc shells (Bus #1, #2, ... #8) used by Leake Academy (a private Methodist school in Madden/Philadelphia MS, est. ~1970s/45+ years) to title individual buses — a common Southern private-school structure. Likely not a standalone commercial carrier and not separately FMCSA-registered. Parent school is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. The 815 Woodland Hills Dr Philadelphia MS 39350 address may be a director/officer residence rather than a bus yard.
